hero.heading: Empowering the Next Generation of Newcomers
hero.paragraph: We are dedicated to designing communities of mentorship, structural leadership programs, and professional pathways for immigrant youth across Canada.

who_we_are.heading: Who We Are
who_we_are.paragraph_1: The Emerging Generation is a Canadian non-profit organization dedicated to fostering spaces of belonging, empowerment, and hope for immigrant and newcomer youth. We believe that every young person arriving in Canada possesses unique strengths, perspectives, and potential.
who_we_are.paragraph_2: Our mission is to walk alongside them during this crucial transition, providing tailored mentorship, leadership training, wellness counseling, and a supportive community. Through our dedicated volunteers and strategic partnerships, we equip youth with the confidence and practical life skills they need to navigate their new home, grow into their capabilities, and give back to their communities.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.paragraph: To build a Canada where every immigrant and newcomer youth transitions successfully, operates as an influential community leader, and feels a profound sense of cultural belonging.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.paragraph: Our ongoing mission is to cultivate structured environments that support mental and physical health, build professional confidence, and coordinate deep peer networking channels.

items.title: Belonging
items.description: Fostering a nurturing ecosystem where youth feel acknowledged, integrated, and celebrated.

items.title: Empowerment
items.description: Instilling the psychological security and physical leadership models to shape agency.

items.title: Growth
items.description: Encouraging dynamic development through career preparation and identity evolution.

items.title: Leadership
items.description: Equipping newcomer youth to take active roles inside local municipal systems.

items.title: Community
items.description: Linking social organizations, leaders, academic partners, and cohorts.

items.title: Service
items.description: Giving back systematically through community outreach, mentoring, and support circles.

promise.heading: Our Core Commitment
promise.paragraph: We promise to build structures that allow every youth member to feel integrated and validated, matching resources to actual local newcomer demographics.

who_we_serve.heading: Who We Serve
who_we_serve.paragraph: We exclusively focus on immigrant and newcomer youth in Canada (ages 15–25). This is a critical age group where foundational educational choices occur alongside complex cultural navigation, and we ensure they receive complete support systems to thrive.

why_us.heading: Why The Emerging Generation?
why_us.paragraph: Unlike general settlement agencies, we tailor our focus entirely around leadership development and community support systems. We believe newcomer youth shouldn't just adapt—they should be equipped to build Canada’s tomorrow.

founder.name: Stella Orji-Dada
founder.title: Founder & Executive Director
paragraphs: As an immigrant arriving in Canada, Stella intimately understands the emotional trials of adjustment, identity negotiation, and systemic pathfinding that young newcomers navigate.

Armed with a Master’s degree in Social Work and a decade of specialized youth advocacy, she built The Emerging Generation to establish systemic frameworks of integration, ensuring no newcomer feels isolated.
founder.quote: When I think about why The Emerging Generation exists, I think about every young person who has ever walked into a new country and wondered if they'd ever truly belong. I've seen how disorienting it can be—navigating unfamiliar systems, building confidence in a new environment, holding onto who you are while discovering who you're becoming.
founder.closing_paragraph: It's not just about settling in. It's about being seen, being valued, and being given the tools to lead. That's what this organization was built for. Every workshop, every mentorship pairing, every conversation we create is rooted in one belief: every young immigrant deserves a place to belong, a community to grow with, and the opportunity to become the leader they were created to be. This is more than a program. It's a promise, and I'm honored to walk this journey alongside every young person who's part of it.

get_involved.heading: Are You Ready to Shape Tomorrow?
